✓ Purchase Order Submitted — Pending Admin Review
⛔  Void Transaction
⊞  Purchase Order Details
🔍  PO ⇄ Inventory Reconciliation
Compares the quantities on approved Purchase Orders against what actually landed in Inventory, and lets you correct any drift.
⧉  Duplicate Item Check
Finds Inventory records that share the exact same Model AND Brand Name — the usual sign that the same product got entered more than once.
🔍  Sales ⇄ Serial Reconciliation
Compares serial numbers picked on completed (non-voided) sales against their actual status in Inventory, and flags any serial that's still showing "In Stock" (or another non-Sold status) even though a receipt was printed for it. This can happen if the status update at checkout failed to save — the sale still goes through, but the inventory record is left stale. Click "Mark Sold" to correct it.
🔍  Voided Sales ⇄ Serial Restock Check
Compares serial numbers picked on VOIDED sales against their actual status in Inventory, and flags any serial that's still showing "Sold" (or another non-In-Stock status) even though the sale it belonged to was voided. This can happen if the automatic restock at void time failed to save — the sale still shows voided, but the inventory record is left stale. Click "Restock" to correct it.
🖨  Print Purchase Order
Type any name, or pick a Super Admin from the suggestions, for the "Approved By" line of the printed document. This is only for the printed copy — it doesn't change the PO's actual approval record.

Attendance-Based Salary Computation
Shows adjusted gross pay based on actual attendance for this month
Employee Monthly Salary Working Days Days Present Absences Daily Rate Absence Deduct Late Deduct OT Pay Adjusted Gross
🔐 Manual Attendance Permissions
Control which Admins can manually log and edit attendance records
ℹ Admins with permission can log new records and edit/delete existing records on the Attendance page.
Admins without permission can still view attendance but cannot make manual changes.
Loading admin accounts…
⚙ Schedule, Deduction & Rate Settings
Set the required time in/out and how late and absence deductions are calculated for payroll
SUPER ADMIN ONLY
ℹ These rates apply to the Payroll Summary table on this page and to the Payroll module.
Changes are saved to Firestore and take effect immediately on next load.
⏰ Required Work Schedule
Used to determine lateness (after grace period) and overtime for all employees. Standard daily hours are derived from this window minus a 1-hour lunch break.

My Leave Applications

NO LEAVE APPLICATIONS YET
Leave Credit Settings
Set how many days each credit pool grants per year by default. Applies to every employee unless that employee has a custom override on their own record. Maternity, Paternity, Bereavement, and Emergency Leave still all draw from one shared pool — filing any one of them reduces the same combined balance — set the pool's fixed size below, then set how many days each type "costs" per approved request out of that pool.
Days consumed per approved request — Maternity / Paternity / Bereavement / Emergency
Each approved request deducts its type's configured day-value from the shared pool above — not the actual number of calendar days on the request.
